tweets.text:
A Los Angeles operation targeting criminal alien sex offenders last week netted 288 illegal alien arrests — and more than 40 of them have sex offense convictions or arrests. 

“Imagine if LAPD or California Highway Patrol wanted to work with us — think about how many other criminal sex offenders we could have found.” — ICE Director Todd Lyons

tweets.text:
ICE’s VOICE Office helps victims and witnesses of immigration-related crimes navigate the immigration process.

VOICE provides easy access to victim services and assists with registration to DHS VINE,  which provides victims with automated custody status information on criminal aliens in ICE custody.

📞Learn more about VOICE on our web page or by calling at 1- 855-48-VOICE (6423).
tweets.text_resolved:

tweets.text:
ICE @ERODallas arrested Francisco Morales-Corado, a 52-year-old violent sexual predator from Guatemala, on Nov. 13. 

He's been convicted of two counts of aggravated sexual assault, kidnapping and possession of a weapon for unlawful purposes in Plainfield, New Jersey, and was sentenced to 14 years in prison. 

His most recent conviction was for illegal reentry in Del Rio, TX, for which he was sentenced to nearly two years in prison.

card.name: summary_large_image
card.title: Homeland Security Task Force Operation Results in the Arrest of More than 150 Illegal Aliens at...
card.description: DHS announced the success of a massive operation in San Antonio, Texas, conducted by the Homeland Security Task Force, co-led by ICE HSI and the FBI.

author.description: Protects America through criminal investigations and by enforcing immigration law to preserve national security and public safety.  https://t.co/rDI2IeFofc

tweets.text:
ICE offers 3 partnership models to law enforcement partners: 

• Jail Enforcement — identify & process removable aliens 

• Task Force — use limited immigration enforcement authority 

• Warrant Service Officer — serve & execute admin. warrants on aliens in custody https://t.co/ZopHlm6Ned

He's been convicted of sexual battery and false imprisonment in Orange, CA, and was sentenced to two years in prison. https://t.co/ysmJbnYIbj

author.description: Protects America through criminal investigations and by enforcing immigration law to preserve national security and public safety.  https://t.co/rDI2IeFofc

tweets.text:
LOS ANGELES — ICE Homeland Security Investigations in Santa Maria arrested three illegal aliens from Mexico and a U.S. citizen for violating immigration and federal laws on visa fraud and fraud in foreign labor contracting Nov. 13. 

The scheme involved forcing workers to pay illegal fees and threatening deportation or violence if they fell behind on payments or complained to authorities.

➡️See more operational photos and learn more details in our newsroom.
tweets.text_resolved:
LOS ANGELES — ICE Homeland Security Investigations in Santa Maria arrested three illegal aliens from Mexico and a U.S. citizen for violating immigration and federal laws on visa fraud and fraud in foreign labor contracting Nov. 13. 

The scheme involved forcing workers to pay illegal fees and threatening deportation or violence if they fell behind on payments or complained to authorities.

➡️See more operational photos and learn more details in our newsroom.

author.description: Protects America through criminal investigations and by enforcing immigration law to preserve national security and public safety.  https://t.co/rDI2IeFofc

tweets.text:
SAN DIEGO – Previously removed Mexican national and convicted human smuggler Roberto Carlos Galeana-Guatemala was charged this week with striking and seriously injuring a federal officer with his vehicle while agents and officers were attempting to arrest him Nov. 12.

Vehicle attacks against federal law enforcement officers are at 99 since Jan. 20 — more than double the 47 attacks during the same period last year.

Vehicular attacks against ICE specifically jumped 1,300%, from 2 to 28.
tweets.text_resolved:

tweets.text:
ICE Buffalo arrested Miguel Antonio Urias Argueta, a 27-year-old criminal alien from El Salvador, on Nov. 17. 

He's been convicted of ATTEMPTED MURDER, ATTEMPTED ASSAULT, CRIMINAL USE OF A FIREARM AND CRIMINAL POSSESSION OF A WEAPON in Nassau County, NY, and was sentenced to 15 years in prison.
